mapper.select: SELECT id, employer_account, job_description, salary_min, salary_max, work_location, university_name, latitude, longitude FROM job_info WHERE status = 1 AND (university_name IS NULL OR university_name = '') ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 10
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_info ( employer_account, salary_min, salary_max, job_description, work_location, status, university_name, latitude, longitude ) VALUES ( #{employerAccount}, #{salaryMin}, #{salaryMax}, #{jobDescription}, #{workLocation}, #{status}, #{universityName}, #{latitude}, #{longitude} )
mapper.update: UPDATE job_info SET employer_account = #{employerAccount}, salary_min = #{salaryMin}, salary_max = #{salaryMax}, job_description = #{jobDescription}, work_location = #{workLocation}, status = #{status}, university_name = #{universityName}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, employer_account, job_description, salary_min, salary_max, work_location, university_name, latitude, longitude FROM job_info WHERE status = 1 AND latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL AND latitude BETWEEN #{minLat} AND #{maxLat} AND longitude BETWEEN #{minLon} AND #{maxLon}
